# Springer Journal Manuscript Template (sn-jnl)

## {title}

{author_names_affiliations}

{corresponding_author}

---

## Abstract

{abstract_max_250_words}

**Keywords:** {keywords}

---

## 1 Introduction

{introduction_text}

---

## 2 Literature Review

{literature_review_text}

---

## 3 Methods

{methods_text}

---

## 4 Results

{results_text}

---

## 5 Discussion

{discussion_text}

---

## 6 Conclusion

{conclusion_text}

---

## Declarations

{declarations}

---

## References

{references}
